title: MCP-A query Request
description: Request for the query primitive (SPEC §3): answer a natural-language question via server-side classification, fan-out, and consolidation. Supply `response_schema` to request structured-response mode.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. Answers are user-scoped and MUST NOT be cached across users.

user_preferences.description: Per-call preference overrides (e.g., timezone, output format).

prior_answers.description: Prior answer_id values for context-aware refinement.

timeout_seconds.description: Compilation timeout (default 30). On exceed, return best-effort draft or TIMEOUT.

draft.description: If true, return a draft answer without waiting for full compilation; poll via follow_up (default false).

include_prose.description: Whether a prose `answer` summary is returned alongside structured output (default true).

response_schema.description: Optional structured-response target with explicit tagged discriminator (SPEC §3, RESOLVED beta). When supplied, the response MUST conform or fail with SCHEMA_NONCONFORMANT.

query_id.description: OPTIONAL (SPEC §3, MAEP-0005). The `answer_id` from a prior `clarification_required` response. Signals a continuation of that query; the server reuses the prior answer's routing context and incorporates the supplied `clarification_inputs`.

clarification_inputs.description: OPTIONAL (SPEC §3, MAEP-0005). A map of field names (from the prior response's `clarification.needed[].name`) to the values the client supplies to resolve the clarification. Used together with `query_id`.
